findings.evidence: `rg -n "symmetricPart_isSymm" code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/SymmetricPart.lean` shows the unconditional lemma at line 48 and this wrapper at lines 154-156, whose proof is just `PDE.symmetricPart_isSymm (a x)`.
findings.fix: Remove this wrapper, or move/rename any needed theorem so its name reflects the unconditional conclusion rather than `UniformlyEllipticOn`.
findings.issue: `UniformlyEllipticOn.symmetricPart_isSymm` is a misleading interface: the name and namespace imply the result depends on uniform ellipticity and `x ∈ Ω`, but both hypotheses are unused and the same conclusion is already the unconditional matrix fact `PDE.symmetricPart_isSymm`.

summary: One new declaration is scoped and named as a uniform-ellipticity fact even though it is just the unconditional symmetry of the matrix symmetric part. No notation issues found.
